display.purpose: Page titles only (h1). Light-weight serif, balanced wrapping.

body.purpose: All interface prose; section intros measure-capped at 600px.

agent-prose.purpose: The agent's voice. Single source of truth: the .agent-prose class (@layer components). Never sans.

label.purpose: The system's single eyebrow device; uppercase 11px category kickers that double as navigation anchors.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: True overlays only (menus, dialogs, popovers). All at-rest surfaces are shadowless — depth is drawn with 1px lines and tone (The Hairline Rule).

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Color/background/border/opacity state transitions on interactive elements.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Disclosure and entrance animations (e.g. observable-work reveal at 180ms ease-out).

motion.name: press-floor
motion.purpose: Press feedback never scales below 0.95; buttons use active:translate-y-px.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Carbon-filled action button; the only filled control on a screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--primary, oklch(0.205 0 0)); color: var(--primary-foreground, oklch(0.985 0 0)); height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Albert Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.15s ease, background-color 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.205 0 0 / 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: var(--background, oklch(1 0 0)); color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Albert Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; transition: background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--muted, oklch(0.97 0 0)); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Pattern Control Chip
components.description: Exclusive demo-state toggle; active = 4% ink wash, aria-pressed.
components.css: .ds-chip-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Albert Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-chip-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); margin-right: 4px; } .ds-chip { min-height: 28px; padding: 4px 10px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.15s ease, background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-chip:hover { color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); background: oklch(0.97 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-chip[aria-pressed="true"] { background: oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.04); color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Hairline-stroked field; 16px on mobile (iOS zoom guard), house focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 36px; padding: 8px 10px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--input, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Albert Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } @media (min-width: 768px) { .ds-input { font-size: 0.875rem; } } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Demo Frame
components.description: The sitewide interactive-specimen container: hairline at 40%, shadowless.
components.css: .ds-frame { border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0 / 0.4); border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; background: var(--background, oklch(1 0 0)); } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-frame { padding: 24px; } } .ds-frame-note { margin: 0; font-family: 'Albert Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); }

components.name: Agent Prose
components.description: The agent's serif voice — the system's signature text style.
components.html: I’ve completed the initial review. The brief covers the main launch goals, but I found three areas that need attention before the release planning meeting.
components.css: .ds-agent-prose { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: -0.4px; font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 12; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Tool Call Row
components.description: Signature observable-work row: monochrome glyph, quiet label, tabular duration revealed on hover.
components.html: Checking roadmap alignment2.1s
components.css: .ds-tool-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 4px; font-family: 'Albert Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); } .ds-tool-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tool-label { font-weight: 400; flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-tool-time { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.15s ease; } .ds-tool-row:hover .ds-tool-time { opacity: 1; }

narrative.overview: A publication at final proofing: monochrome ink on white, every claim checked, every numeral tabular, the author's voice set in serif against the apparatus of sans-serif instrumentation. The interface is the proofing table — quiet, flat, ruled with hairlines and dashed section breaks — and the agent's words are the manuscript on it. Two voices, one page: the product speaks Albert Sans; the agent speaks Source Serif 4. Nothing glows, nothing bounces, nothing pretends.
keyCharacteristics: Achromatic surface; color exists only as state semantics
Two-voice typography: sans for the interface, serif for the agent
Flat depth — drawn with 1px lines and tone, never cast with shadows
Calibrated motion: 150–250ms, exponential ease-outs, press floor at 0.95
Honest affordances: every control works; nothing looks expandable that isn't

rules.name: The Ink Rule
rules.body: The interface is achromatic. Chroma is semantics: if an element is colored, it is making a claim about state (ok / caution / destructive). Decorative color is prohibited — including on icons, which are always monochrome line icons at strokeWidth 1.5.

rules.name: The Tokens-Only Rule
rules.body: No raw hex or oklch literal ever appears in a component. Status colors come from --status-ok, --status-warn, --destructive; everything else from the semantic ramp.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Sans is the product speaking; serif is the agent speaking. Never set UI chrome in serif, never set agent responses in sans, and never introduce a third family.

rules.name: The One Kicker Rule
rules.body: The uppercase section-label is the system's single eyebrow device, tied to the section-rhythm system. Do not add second-tier eyebrows, numbered markers, or badge-kickers above headings.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: If a boundary needs marking, draw a 1px line or step the background one tone; never cast a shadow to separate two flat surfaces.

rules.name: The Honest Affordance Rule
rules.body: Nothing may look interactive that isn't: no cursor-pointer on dead rows, no hover treatment on non-links, no expandable chrome on empty disclosures, and every demo control visibly changes the demo it claims to control.

rules.name: The Calibrated Motion Rule
rules.body: State transitions run 150ms; reveals 180–300ms on cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); press feedback never scales below 0.95; ambient loops are rare and finite. Every animation has a prefers-reduced-motion alternative. The highest-frequency action gets no flourish at all.

dos: Do keep icons monochrome, line-style, strokeWidth 1.5, one meaning per glyph (robot = agent, brain = memory, waveform = activity feed).

Do use plain text-muted-foreground (no opacity modifier) for all informational text and interactive glyphs; 4.5:1 body contrast is non-negotiable (WCAG 2.1 AA). Opacity-reduced muted-foreground is permitted only on decorative, aria-hidden, or disabled elements.
Do write demo data as plausible telemetry: staggered durations, odd numbers, believable product names, section-style locations for path sources, Page N only for PDFs.
Do use typographic quotes in all rendered copy.
Do give every outcome a role=status and move focus to it when the triggering control unmounts.
Do end sections with a spec table only when it encodes non-visible contract, and an italic callout only when it states a rule the demo cannot show (≤2 callouts per page).
donts: Don't ship AI-demo chrome: glowing gradients, sparkle icons, chat-bubble theater, spinners on tool calls, success/failure icons on tool calls, oversized rounded everything.
Don't use pill shapes — rounded-md/rounded-lg consistently, never full-radius capsules.
Don't inject style tags, use transition-all, space-x/y-* utilities, clickable divs, or raw status colors — all hard-failed by scripts/audit-ui.mjs in CI.
Don't use border-left > 1px as a colored accent, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism, ever.
Don't add per-component dark: color overrides for new work; both themes live at the token layer.
Don't animate layout properties, bounce, or scale presses below 0.95; don't gate content visibility on a reveal animation.
Don't let any text clip or overflow: table prose cells wrap, headings balance, long prose sets text-wrap: pretty.
